'''Alyn Rae''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] entrepreneur.<ref name="CSWE" /> Shortly after the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]],<ref name="NEGTAS" /><ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> he developed [[cone sock]]s, a [[Clothing/Legends|garment]] designed for Gotals to wear over their head [[cones]]. These cones were extra-sensory organs that could detect energy emissions, but their sensitivity rendered Gotals easily susceptible to pain or disorientation while in the presence of [[Droid/Legends|droids]] or other machines that emitted electromagnetic energy. Rae's chemical-based garment, when worn over head cones, filtered out incoming electromagnetic emissions and allowed other transmissions to pass through.<ref name="NEGTAS" />

Rae worked with several [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] who were not native to the Gotal [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]] while designing cone socks, as they were adept at using the equipment that was required to design and construct the garment. Cone socks were expensive and initially only worn by wealthy Gotals, but their practicality saw them grow in popularity<ref name="NEGTAS" /> and become favored in energy-rich environments by many Gotals throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="NEGTAS" /><ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Alyn Rae was first mentioned in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'', a reference book published in [[2006]].<ref name="NEGTAS" />
